title.purpose: Page titles and major workflow headings.

body.purpose: Instructions, field values, tables, and result summaries.

label.purpose: Buttons, fields, tabs, and status labels.

shadows.name: overlay-only
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, drawers, modals, and notifications only.

motion.name: state-feedback
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, selection, and overlay state changes; disabled for reduced motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single emphasized action in a workflow area.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 32px; padding: 4px 15px; border: 1px solid #1890ff; border-radius: 2px; background: #1890ff; color: #fff; font: 400 14px/1.5715 Inter, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms ease-out, border-color 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #40a9ff; border-color: #40a9ff; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1890ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: A labeled compact field for filtering available Pokemon or items.
components.html: <label class="ds-field">Available Pokemon<input class="ds-input-search" type="search" placeholder="Search species"></label>
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 5px; color: #000000d9; font: 400 14px/1.5715 Inter, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-input-search { min-height: 32px; padding: 4px 11px; border: 1px solid #d9d9d9; border-radius: 2px; background: #fff; color: #000000d9; font: inherit; transition: border-color 180ms ease-out; } .ds-input-search:hover { border-color: #40a9ff; } .ds-input-search:focus-visible { border-color: #1890ff; outline: 2px solid #1890ff; outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Side Navigation Item
components.description: A compact item in the existing dark collapsible navigation.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; min-height: 40px; align-items: center; padding: 0 16px; color: #fff; background: #001529; font: 400 14px/1.5715 Inter, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: color 180ms ease-out, background-color 180ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #40a9ff; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1890ff; outline-offset: -2px; }

narrative.overview: A practical work surface where save context, available actions, editable data, and operation results remain easy to locate. The system is flat, structured, compact, and explicit.
keyCharacteristics: Compact, information-dense layouts with 20-24px section spacing.
Visible save context, capacity, and compatibility before mutation.
One blue action accent used for primary actions, selection, and focus.
Existing Ant Design light and dark themes, not a separate visual rebrand.
Pokemon sprites and icons used as functional recognition aids.

rules.name: The One Action Color Rule
rules.body: Blue means interactive, selected, or focused. It is never background decoration.

rules.name: The Flat Workbench Rule
rules.body: Static tool areas and data tables remain flat. Shadows are reserved for overlays.

dos: Do keep current-save context, available box capacity, and compatibility visible near bulk actions.
Do use existing Ant Design controls and state behavior before creating custom primitives.
donts: Don't create a neon gaming dashboard that prioritizes visual effects over data clarity.
Don't ship destructive or bulk actions with unclear scope, silent partial completion, or implicit overwrite behavior.
